zh.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III於1160年出生。他和Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour至少有1個兒子。他去世於1258年享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III于1160年出生。他和Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour至少有1个儿子。他去世于1258年享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old Norse, originally a byname meaning ‘bride, wife’; in mythology the name of Thor's golden-haired wife.

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

nameMeanings.name: Fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Either a short form of any of the numerous names representing a transferred use of a surname formed with the Anglo-Norman French prefix fi(t)z ‘son of ’, as for example Fitzgerald , Fitzroy , or a transferred use of the surname Fitz, which may be of the same derivation, but applied originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same given name, or a local name from Fitz in Shropshire, named with the Old English personal name Fitt + hōh ‘hill spur’.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III was born in 1160. He had at least 1 son with Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour. He died in 1258, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III est né en 1160. Il a eu au moins 1 fils avec Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour. Il est décédé en 1258, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III wurde 1160 geboren. Er hatte mit Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1258 im Alter von 98 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III è nato il nel 1160. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio con Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour. Morì nel 1258, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin IIIは1160年に生まれた。彼はBaropness Maude le Botiller Vavasourとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1258年に98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III(은)는 1160년 태어났다. 그는 Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1258년 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III nasceu em 1160. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho com Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour. Ele faleceu em 1258, com 98 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III родился в 1160 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын от Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour. Он умер в 1258 г. в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk Fitz Warin III nació en 1160. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Baropness Maude le Botiller Vavasour. Murió en 1258, a la edad de 98 años.
